summary:
The available evidence highlights systemic supports such as real-time trend tracking, risk assessment, and multidepartmental coordination—which mirror critical aspects of clinical supervision—and demonstrate its necessity for ensuring safe, reliable, and resilient care delivery amidst growing complexities. These structural safeguards contribute significantly to workforce sustainability in modern healthcare.  

$\boxed{A}$
